Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter

package com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter
Scatter/gather splitter contracts and context types.

A PayloadSplitter breaks a composite payload into per-slice StoreContext entries on store and merges recovered RecoverContext slices back into a single value on recovery.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload
    Payload envelope, enrichment, and post-recovery handling.
  • Class
    Description
    PayloadSplitter<T,R>
    Strategy that splits a composite payload into individual slices for scatter/gather operations.
    PayloadSplitterExecutionException
    Thrown when a user-provided PayloadSplitter raises an exception during splitOnStore, splitOnRecover, or merge.
    PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R>
    Strategy for resolving a PayloadSplitter by qualifier or bean name.
    PayloadSplitterNotFoundException
    Thrown when PayloadSplitterLookup cannot resolve the PayloadSplitter named in Failover.payloadSplitter().
    RecoverContext<T>
    Mutable context passed to PayloadSplitter.splitOnRecover(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.RecoverContext<T>) and PayloadSplitter.merge(java.util.List<com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.RecoverContext<R>>).
    StoreContext<T>
    Immutable context passed to PayloadSplitter.splitOnStore(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.splitter.StoreContext<T>) and produced by it.
